case_title: KELLY TRENT VS. MASON MAYER et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT ZACHARY BOGUE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED.
